title: VerdantVibes
description: Adds tons of plants to enrich your world and homes!
body:
![header](https://i.imgur.com/sn6yHaM.gif)
![body](https://i.postimg.cc/MTZWpyhm/ezgif-com-optimize.gif)
![footer](https://i.imgur.com/dNswRLk.png)
![update](https://i.imgur.com/2Vz2MV0.png)

## Description:

VerdantVibes is a **Client- & Serverside** Mod that adds various kinds of new plants to the world for you to bring home!

You might know them as **popular houseplants** like the Monstera or the Snake Plant.

After locating them in their respective biomes, you can put them in Flowerpots and **rotate the pots to your liking**!

With its simple models and textures, VerdantVibes looks really **Vanilla+ styled** while maintaining the look of the plants you're familiar with.

Don't refrain from suggesting your favorite plants for later updates, I'll be happy to hear your opinions!

[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/7bad0fe1-2bea-4045-9f23-a01d03a2ebb0.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/Pandarix)
